title: Paris Calling
writer: Hans Székely, Benjamin Glazer, Charles Kaufman
actors: Elisabeth Bergner, Randolph Scott, Basil Rathbone
plot: Marianne Jannetier, a well-to-do Parisian, engaged to Andre Benoit, a high-ranking government official, flee the city when the goose-stepping German storm troopers arrive. After her mother dies on the road to Bordeaux as a result ...
